boilerhouseDocs, dressed like the dashboard.

Dark surfaces, teal accent, Inter + JetBrains Mono — a VitePress theme that matches the Boilerhouse control plane.

Dashboard Palette

surface-0 → surface-4 backgrounds with a

Inter Tight Headings

Display type in Inter Tight, body in Inter, code in JetBrains Mono — same stack the app uses.

Rounded-md Panels

0.375rem radius on every card, button, and code block — matches the rounded-md utility used throughout the UI.
